节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: The Text module provides a set of APIs for text layout and font management. It aims to deliver high-quality typesetting through features like character-to-glyph conversion, kerning, line breaking, alignment, and text measurement. Additionally, it provides font management capabilities, including font registration, font descriptors, and font collection management. This module provides the following classes for creating complex text paragraphs: TextStyle: defines the font type, size, spacing, and other text properties. FontCollection: manages a collection of different fonts. FontDescriptor: provides information about font descriptors. ParagraphStyle: controls line break and word break strategies for the entire paragraph. ParagraphBuilder: used to create different paragraph objects. Paragraph: created by calling build() of the ParagraphBuilder class. LineTypeset: created by calling buildLineTypeset() of the ParagraphBuilder class. TextLine: paragraph text on a line-by-line basis, obtained by calling getTextLines() of the Paragraph class. Run: text typesetting unit, obtained by calling getGlyphRuns() of the TextLine class.
Refers to how to align the horizontal position of text when displaying text.
Use the left side of the text as a reference line for alignment.
Use the right side of the text as a reference line for alignment.
Use the midpoint line the text as a reference line for alignment.
Justified, which means that each line (except the last line) is stretched so that every line has equal width, and the left and right margins are straight.
Align text from start, based on the TextDirection, such as left-to-right or right-to-left.
Align text from end, based on the TextDirection, such as left-to-right or right-to-left, opposite to START.
Enumerates the vertical alignment modes.
Baseline alignment in the vertical direction.
Bottom alignment in the vertical direction.
Center alignment in the vertical direction.
Top alignment in the vertical direction.
Enumerate text runs direction.
The text is oriented from right to left.
The text is oriented from left to right.
Enumerate text segmentation strategy.
Fills the current line as much as possible without adding hyphens.
Optimizes layout and may add hyphens when necessary.
Ensures consistent line width in a paragraph, adding hyphens if needed.
Enumerate word break strategy.
Default mode that break words based on language-specific conventions.

Allows breaks within any character in non-CJK text. (CJK means Chinese, Japanese, and Korean.) This value is suitable for Asian text that contains some non-Asian text. For example, it can be used to break consecutive English characters.

Allows breaks between any two characters in non-CJK text. It prioritizes breaking at whitespace or other natural breakpoints to keep words intact. If no breakpoints are found, it breaks between any two characters. For CJK text, this behaves like NORMAL.
Attempts to break words at the end of a line using a hyphen. If a hyphen cannot be added, it behaves like BREAK_WORD.
Describes a text decoration.
Type of the decoration. The default value is NONE.
Color of the decoration. The default value is transparent.
Style of the decoration. The default value is SOLID.
Scale factor for the thickness of the decoration line. The value is a floating point number. The default value is 1.0.
Enumerates the text decoration types.
There are no text decoration.
There is a decoration line below the text.
There is a decoration line above the text.
There is a decoration line through the middle of the text.
Enumerates the text decoration styles.
Decoration line is solid line.
Decoration line is double line.
Decoration line is dotted line.
Decoration line is dashed line.
Decoration line is wavy line.
Enumeration of font weight of text.
Thin
Extra-light
Light
Normal/Regular
Medium
Semi-bold
Bold
Extra-bold
Black
Enumeration of font style of text.
Upright font type.
Slant font. If no italic version is available for the current font, the oblique version will be used instead.
Oblique font. If no oblique version is available for the current font, the italic version will be used instead.
Enumeration of font width of text.
Ultra condensed font width.
Extra condensed font width.
Condensed font width.
Semi condensed font width.
Normal font width.
Semi expanded font width.
Expanded font width.
Extra expanded font width.
Ultra expanded font width.
Enumerates the text height modifier patterns.
Allows the first line of the paragraph to rise and the last line to drop.
Prevents the first line of a paragraph from rising.
Prevents the last line of a paragraph from dropping.
Combines the effects of disabling the first line from rising and the last line from dropping.
Enumeration the type of text baseline.
The alphabetic baseline, typically used for Latin-based scripts where the baseline aligns with the base of lowercase letters.
The ideographic baseline, commonly used for ideographic scripts such as Chinese, Japanese, and Korean, where the baseline aligns with the center of characters.
Enumerates of ellipsis mode. EllipsisMode.START and EllipsisMode.MIDDLE take effect only when text overflows in a single line.
Places the ellipsis in the text header. It is valid only when maxLines is set to 1 in ParagraphStyle.
Places the ellipsis in the middle of the text. It is valid only when maxLines is set to 1 in ParagraphStyle.
Places the ellipsis at the end of the text.
Describes shadow of text.
Color of the text shadow. The default value is black (255, 0, 0, 0).
Position of the text shadow relative to the text. The horizontal and vertical coordinates must be greater than or equal to 0.
The value sets special effect radius of blurring text. The value is a floating point number. The default value is 0.0px.
注释信息: @type { ?number } The value about radius of blur, it type is "double"

节点.功能描述: Enumerates line height scaling type.
Use the font size as the scale factor for line height scaling.
Use the text height after shaping as the scale factor for line height scaling.
Describes font feature of text.
String identified by the keyword in the font feature key-value pair.
Value in the font feature key-value pair.
Describes font variation of text.
String identified by the keyword in the font variation key-value pair.
Value in the font variation key-value pair.
Describes badge type of text.
No badge.
Superscript.
Subscript.
Describes text style.
Text decoration. By default, no decoration is used.
Text color. The default color is white.

Font weight. The default value is W400. Currently, only the default system font supports font weight adjustment. For other fonts, if the weight is less than semi-bold (W600), there is no variation in stroke thickness. If the weight is greater than or equal to semi-bold, it might result in a fake bold effect.
Font style. The default value is NORMAL.
Text baseline type. The default value is ALPHABETIC.
Array of font families. By default, the array is empty, indicating that all system fonts are matched.
Font size, in units of px. The value is a floating point number. The default value is 14.0.

Letter spacing, in units of px. The value is a floating point number. The default value is 0.0. A positive value causes characters to spread farther apart, and a negative value bring characters closer together.
Word spacing, in units of px. The value is a floating point number. The default value is 0.0.
Maximum line height. The value is a double number.
Minimum line height. The value is a double number.
Line height scaling base style. The default value is FONT_SIZE.
Scale factor of the line height. The value is a floating point number. The default value is 1.0. This parameter is valid only when heightOnly is set to true.

Whether half leading is enabled. Half leading is the leading split in half and applied equally to the top and bottom edges. The value true means that half leading is enabled, and false means the opposite. The default value is false.

How the height of the text box is set. The value true means that the height of the text box is set based on the font size and the value of heightScale, and false means that the height is set based on the line height and line spacing. The default value is false.
Ellipsis content, which will be used to replace the extra content.
Ellipsis type. The default value is END, indicating that the ellipsis is at the end of a line.
Locale. For example, 'en' indicates English, 'zh-Hans' indicates Simplified Chinese, and 'zh-Hant' indicates Traditional Chinese. For details, see ISO 639-1. The default value is an empty string.
Shift of the baseline. The value is a floating point number. The default value is 0.0px.
Text Style available font features.
Text shadows of text.
Rectangle style of text.
Text Style available font variations.
Text style available badge type.
注释信息: @type { ?TextBadgeType } The type of text badge type.

节点.功能描述: Loads a custom font. This API uses a promise to return the result. In this API, name specifies the alias of the font, and the custom font effect can be displayed only when the value of name is set in fontFamilies in TextStyle. The supported font file formats are ttf and otf. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.

节点.功能描述: Loads a custom font with enhanced error checking. This API returns the result synchronously. In this API, name specifies the alias of the font, and the custom font effect can be displayed only when the value of name is set in fontFamilies in TextStyle. The supported font file formats are .ttf, .otf and .ttc. The value must be **"file:// + absolute path of the font file"** or **$rawfile("path of the font file")**.
注释信息: @param { string | Resource } path - Path of the font file to load.
@param { number } [index] - The index of the font file.
@throws { BusinessError } 25900003 - Failed to open the file.
@throws { BusinessError } 25900005 - Failed to get the file size.
@throws { BusinessError } 25900006 - Failed to read the file.

parameters.说明: the font name.
Path of the font file to load.
number } [index] - The index of the font file.

error_codes.description: Failed to get the file size.

节点.功能描述: Unloads a custom font synchronously. This API returns the result synchronously. After unloading a font alias through this API, the corresponding custom font will no longer be available. All typography using the font alias should be destroyed and re-created. - Unloading a non-existent font alias has no effect and will **not** throw an error. - This operation only affects subsequent font usages. unload a font that is currently in used may lead to text rendering anomalies, including garbled characters or missing glyphs. This must exactly match the name used when loading the font through.
注释信息: @param { string } name - The alias of the font to unload.

parameters.说明: The alias of the font to unload.

This must exactly match the name used when loading the font through.
注释信息: @param { string } name - The alias of the font to unload.
@returns { Promise<void> } Promise that returns no value.

parameters.说明: The alias of the font to unload.

节点.功能描述: Clear font caches. The font cache has a memory limit and a clearing mechanism. It occupies limited memory. You are not advised to clear it unless otherwise required.
Describes the strut style, which determines the line spacing, baseline alignment mode, and other properties related to the line height when drawing texts. The strut style is disabled by default.
List of font families. By default, the list corresponds to the system's default fonts.
Font style. The default value is NORMAL.
Font width. The default value is NORMAL.

Font weight. The default value is W400. The default system font supports font weight adjustment. For other fonts, if the weight is less than W600, there is no variation in stroke thickness. If the weight is greater than or equal to W600, it might result in a fake bold effect.
Font size, in units of px. The value is a floating point number. The default value is 14.0.
Scale factor of the line height. The value is a floating point number. The default value is 1.0.
Custom leading to be applied to the strut. The value is a floating point number. The default value is -1.0.
Whether to forcibly use the strut height for all lines. The value true means to forcibly use the strut height for all lines, and false means the opposite. The default value is false.
Whether to enable the strut style. The value true means to enable the strut style, and false means the opposite. The default value is false.
Whether to override the height. The value true means to override the height, and false means the opposite. The default value is false.

Whether half leading is enabled. Half leading is the leading split in half and applied equally to the top and bottom edges. The value true means that half leading is enabled, and false means the opposite. The default value is false.
Determines the configuration used by ParagraphBuilder to position lines within a Paragraph of text.
Text style applied to the paragraph. The default value is the initial text style.
Text direction. The default value is LTR.
Text alignment mode. The default value is START. This parameter is invalid when the tab parameter is configured.
Word break type. The default value is BREAK_WORD.
Maximum number of lines. The value is an integer. The default value is 1e9.
Text break strategy. The default value is GREEDY.
Strut style. The default value is the initial StrutStyle object.
Text height modifier pattern. The default value is ALL.

Alignment mode and position of the text after the tab character in a paragraph. By default, the tab character is replaced with a space. This parameter is invalid when it is used together with the align parameter or the ellipsis parameter in TextStyle.
Whether to optimize white spaces at the end of each line.
Whether to enable automatic spacing between Chinese and English for paragraph.
Vertical alignment mode of the paragraph.
Line spacing. The value is a double number.
Whether to enable compression of leading punctuation.
Whether to Add padding to the font.
Whether to enable line spacing fallback.
Enumerates the vertical alignment modes of a placeholder relative to the surrounding text.
Aligns the baseline of the placeholder to the baseline of the text.
Aligns the bottom edge of the placeholder to the baseline of the text. sits on top of the baseline.
Aligns the top edge of the placeholder to the baseline of the text. hangs below the baseline.
Align the top edge of the placeholder with the top edge of the font. When the placeholder is very tall, the extra space will hang from the top and extend through the bottom of the line.
Align the bottom edge of the placeholder with the bottom edge of the text. When the placeholder is very tall, the extra space will rise from the bottom and extend through the top of the line.
Align the middle of the placeholder with the middle of the text. When the placeholder is very tall, the extra space will grow equally from the top and bottom of the line.
Follow Paragraph setting,
Describes the placeholder style.
Width of the placeholder, in units of px. The value is a floating point number.
Height of the placeholder, in units of px. The value is a floating point number.
Vertical alignment of the placeholder relative to the surrounding text.
Type of the text baseline.
Offset to the text baseline, in units of px. The value is a floating point number.
Describes a left-closed and right-open interval.
Index of the leftmost point of the interval. The value is an integer.
Index of the rightmost point of the interval. The value is an integer.
Enumerates the font types, which can be combined through bitwise OR operations.
All font types, including the system font type, style font type, and user-installed font type.
System generic font type.
Style font type. The style font type is designed for 2-in-1 devices.
Font type that has been installed.
Customized font types.
Describes the font descriptor information.
Absolute path of the font. Any string is acceptable, but the value must adhere to the system's path constraints. The default value is an empty string.
Unique name of the font. Any string is acceptable. The default value is an empty string.
Font name. Any string is acceptable. The default value is an empty string.
Family name of the font. Any string is acceptable. The default value is an empty string.
Subfamily name of the font. Any string is acceptable. The default value is an empty string.
Font weight. The default value is 0.
Font width. The value is an integer ranging from 1 to 9. The default value is 0.
Whether the font is italic. The value 0 means that the font is not italic, and 1 means the opposite. The default value is 0.
Whether the font is monospaced. The value true means that the font is monospaced, and false means the opposite. The default value is false.
Whether the font is symbolic. The value true means that the font is symbolic, and false means the opposite.
Font local post script name
Font local full name
Font local family name
Font local subfamily name
Font version
Font manufacture
Font copyright
Font trademark
Font license
The font index in ttc file

节点.功能描述: Implements a carrier that stores the text content and style. It can be used to compute layout details for individual lines of text. Before calling any of the following APIs, you must use buildLineTypeset() in the ParagraphBuilder class to create a LineTypeset object.

Obtains the number of characters that can fit in the layout from the specified position within a limited width. [0, total number of text characters). If the parameter is invalid, an exception is thrown.
